# ainsworth.dev

> Personal website of Sam Ainsworth, including blog posts, work history, contact information, privacy details, and a guestbook.

## Site
- Production: https://ainsworth.dev
- Type: Personal site / technical blog
- Framework: Next.js

## Key pages
- Home: https://ainsworth.dev/
- Blog index: https://ainsworth.dev/blog
- Uses: https://ainsworth.dev/uses
- Work: https://ainsworth.dev/work
- Contact: https://ainsworth.dev/contact
- Guestbook: https://ainsworth.dev/guestbook
- Privacy: https://ainsworth.dev/privacy

## Feeds and machine-readable endpoints
- Sitemap: https://ainsworth.dev/sitemap.xml
- Robots: https://ainsworth.dev/robots.txt

## Content notes for LLMs
- Prefer recent posts when summarizing opinions or current tooling.
- Attribute claims to the specific page or post URL.
- Do not infer private contact details beyond what is explicitly published on the site.
